task: Press the button on the top right side of the breakfast marker to open the chamber on the right
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A light blue toaster sits on a white table. It has a top surface with a metallic tray. The task is to press a button on the top right to open the right chamber. The toaster is rigid with a flat top surface. STRATEGY - Reach the toaster, locate the right button, and press it. Failure mode: mislocating the button. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the toaster body; Step 2 locate the right button on the top surface; Step 3 press the button to trigger the opening mechanism.**
Goal: opened(chamber_right)
Scene: light_blue_toaster, white_table
Step 1: reach(light_blue_toaster)
  affordance_region: the body of the light blue toaster
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, light_blue_toaster, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, light_blue_toaster) < 0.03
Step 2: press(button_right)
  affordance_region: the top right button on the light blue toaster
  contact: button_pressed(button_right) [completion]
  spatial: on(button_right, light_blue_toaster) [progress]
  direction: press_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: button_pressed(button_right)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the light blue toaster
the top right button on the light blue toaster
